title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Shree Kadi Nagarik Sahakari Bank Ltd., Dist. Mehsana, Gujarat
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBl) has, by an order dated May 06, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹16.30 lakh (Rupees Sixteen Lakh Thirty Thousand only) on Shree Kadi Nagarik Sahakari Bank Ltd., Dist. Mehsana, Gujarat (the bank), for non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Exposure Norms and Statutory / Other Restrictions – UCBs’, and ‘Management of Advances - UCBs’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under t
